side_effects.description: Very dry, red, itchy, swollen eyes occurring the day after injection; happened 3 times with first occurrence most severe lasting ~2 days; subsequent occurrences less severe

protocol_notes: Took Claritin before shots and ensured hydration to manage reaction. Used Systane eye drops. Reaction attributed to possible histamine response or dehydration-related eye dryness. Has epipens on hand. Recommends starting at <0.25mg with antihistamines if retrying after a reaction.
